subcodes.first_line: O seeker of divine good-pleasure! The beauty that adorns the countenance of God's servants is, in some, mere comeliness, while in others it manifesteth as the most sublime and exalted beauty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای طالب رضای الهی حسن روی بندگان حق بعضی در مقام حسن است و برخی احسن حسن از
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice, @self-improvement; self-perfection; discipline
